{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Scribe Icon
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|There is no such thing as a [[Script]] [[Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
